commands.devtools.mob_vision_debug.legen: Orange: normal detection. Cyan: sneaking detection. The ring is unavoidable close-range awareness.
commands.devtools.mob_vision_debug.missi: Mob vision debug requires Mobs Combat.
message.devtools.lootr_dev_tool_no_permi: Creative mode or permission level 2 is required.
message.devtools.lootr_dev_tool_no_room: No room to place a Lootr chest.
tooltip.devtools.lootr_dev_tool.place: Right-click to place or retarget a Lootr chest.
tooltip.devtools.lootr_dev_tool.reroll: Left-click a Lootr chest to reroll it.
